title: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple
tagline: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Koothanur in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Koothanur in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Saraswathi, the Hindu goddess of learning.

topPlaces.name: Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple (சிதலப்பதி முத்தீசுவரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Sethalapathy in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirumalam
topPlaces.description: Agarathirumalam is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple situated at Kodiyalur near Peralam in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirumeeyachur Meganathar Temple (திருமீயச்சூர் மேகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeeyachur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, called Meganathaswami.

topPlaces.name: Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple
topPlaces.description: Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Lord Rama, the seventh avatar of Lord Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram
topPlaces.description: Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram is situated at Thirupampuram in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple(அம்பல் பிரமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ambal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the place is known as Koilpatthu.

topPlaces.name: Peralam
topPlaces.description: Peralam is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple (சிதலப்பதி முத்தீசுவரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Sethalapathy in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.
Agarathirumalam is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.
Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple situated at Kodiyalur near Peralam in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

Tirumeeyachur Meganathar Temple (திருமீயச்சூர் மேகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeeyachur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, called Meganathaswami.

Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Lord Rama, the seventh avatar of Lord Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.
Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram is situated at Thirupampuram in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple(அம்பல் பிரமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ambal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the place is known as Koilpatthu.
Peralam is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (104 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple, Agarathirumalam, Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple, Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple.
